candidate: HIPENGINE_VERIFY_DENSE_GEMV_WMMA=1 for verifier linear-attention A/B FP16 dense projections
decision_reason: The existing WMMA dense GEMV path stayed exact on quicksort and the 9-prompt D32 suite, but it regressed every prompt's cycle cost with unchanged acceptance density. Keep the default scalar dense_gemv_out_fp16 path.

workload.suite: llama.cpp mtp-bench prompt suite, raw prompt render

commands.quicksort_smoke: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_VERIFY_DENSE_GEMV_WMMA=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-dense-gemv-wmma-smoke.json
commands.suite_control: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_VERIFY_DENSE_GEMV_WMMA=0 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-dense-gemv-wmma-off-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-dense-gemv-wmma-off-9prompt-d32.json
commands.suite_candidate: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_VERIFY_DENSE_GEMV_WMMA=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-dense-gemv-wmma-on-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-dense-gemv-wmma-on-9prompt-d32.json

notes: The isolated GPU fixture tests for dense_gemv_out_fp16_wmma already exist in tests/test_dense_gemv_wmma.py.
A rocprof follow-up was skipped because the same-session suite regression is large and uniform across prompts; profiling would not make this a retained speed row.
